commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 delete all 2>/dev/null || true'
sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /opt/MBUTOMS/whatsapp-bridge && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env && pm2 save'

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for name in ('mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out-0.log','mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log','mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-error-0.log'):
    p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs') / name
    if not p.exists():
        print(name + ': missing')
        continue
    lines = p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    print('=== ' + name + ' lines=' + str(len(lines)) + ' ===')
    for ln in lines[-25:]:
        print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
    print('')
PY
